---
title: "Piras, Davide, Dr."
description: "Software Engineer"
image: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dpiras/dpiras.github.io/master/assets/images/propic_ethz_small.jpg
categories: [staff, all]
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    #see a list of available icons here: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dpiras@ethz.ch 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/dpiras
    - icon: github
      text: Homepage
      href: https://dpiras.github.io/
---
After obtaining his PhD from the interdisciplinary Centre for Doctoral Training in Data Intensive Science at UCL, Davide was a Research Fellow in the CosmoParticle initiative, and then a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Geneva working at the intersection of ML and theoretical physics. In 2026, he joined the ETHZ Space Centre to continue working on the development of ML algorithms for space missions like LISA.
